objective: Add a guarded JoinQuant get_price probe for a MARKET proxy sequence without promoting ordinary price data as a total-return label source.
forbidden: Do not print, write, or leak JoinQuant credentials.
Do not call JoinQuant unless execute_probe is explicitly enabled.
Do not write market_total_return_index.csv unless adjusted proxy write approval is explicit.
Do not treat ordinary get_price output as official total-return data.
Do not run labels, IC, hit rate, backtests, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, or model promotion.
acceptance: Credential readiness must be boolean/generic only.
Probe plan must state that probe success is not total-return-source acceptance.
Write policy must separately reject certified-total-return promotion.
No performance validation or model promotion may be produced.
